_: Editorial pins for the site's featured slots (audit M3 tail, owner-approved 2026-07-21). These are the hand-picked featured examples that previously lived as constants in page JS; moving them here versions the editorial selection and keeps vocabulary in data files. Pointer pattern follows provenance.json steering.key_example. Consumers: scripts/embed_scenario_joins.py (tap_demo, care_ladder -> payload.featured), scripts/export_dialect_matrix.py (dialect_featured_term_pattern -> dialects.json featured_term). Hand-curated; owner changes pins by editing this file.

tap_demo._labels: continuation-disambiguated display labels for wordpiece tops; matches the labels the home-page demo has shown since 2026-07-16
